use_cases: Hero section animated background for landing pages
Interactive decorative backdrop for SaaS applications
Engaging visual element for portfolio or creative websites
Dynamic background for marketing and promotional content
ai_summary: An interactive particle network animation that renders animated dots connected by lines within a specified distance threshold. The canvas-based component features mouse tracking, heartbeat pulsing effects, gradient backgrounds, and responsive resizing. Creates an engaging network visualization effect suitable for hero sections or decorative backgrounds.
